ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency pair */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency in the pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency in the pair */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency pair (e.g., aud_jpy) */,
  "pair_status" TEXT /* Status of the currency pair (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update time of the currency pair */,
  "spread" REAL /* Typical spread for the currency pair */,
  "liquidity_index" REAL /* Liquidity index of the currency pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "tz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "time_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone (e.g., UTC, EST) */,
  "gmt_offset" REAL /* GMT offset for the time zone */,
  "dst_observed" INTEGER /* Whether Daylight Saving Time is observed */,
  "tz_description" TEXT /* Description of the time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency pair */,
  "tz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time zone */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading session (e.g., New York Session, London Session) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_tz_id FOREIGN KEY ("tz_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("tz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading strategy (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency pair */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the strategy */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the strategy */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the strategy */,
  "performance_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance metric (e.g., active, historical) */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., real, backtest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency pair */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, gain) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the triggered alert */,
  "trigger_time" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency pair */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest period */,
  "initial_balance" REAL /* Initial balance for the backtest */,
  "final_balance" REAL /* Final balance for the backtest */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the trades */,
  "avg_profit" REAL /* Average profit per winning trade */,
  "avg_loss" REAL /* Average loss per losing trade */,
  "backtest_status" TEXT /* Status of the backtest (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "backtest_description" TEXT /* Description of the backtest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
